subject: thoughts
body:
Mere thanks are not enough to express my gratitude for your hospitality. I will endeavor to return the warm friendship offered.. Two thoughts...1. His Highness should take great care to make certain his book" MY Vision" , is translated with sensitivity and grace. The translations that I have read do not do his thoughts justice.MY countrys  POEM, would be a better title.  As I'm sure  it will be read by a wide audience of english speaking people, they will not comprehend his sophsitication if the words are crude, and the sentences awkward. He deserves better. and so do his ideas. 2. I would be very careful about having an IPO , too quickly, as it would also cause a larger problem of confidence in the outlook for the country  if the stock came under pressure, for reasons out of your control..(ie. world markets or terrorism in the area for example). I would think issuing  Bonds ,with a kicker, i.e.  maybe a promise of  a first right to convert into equity IF and when you decide to ipo.would be preferable.. HOPE to see you soon



 
____________________________________________________________________________________
